description:
Your creative community to connect, collaborate, and get discovered.

Avid Link is a free app that allows easy install and management of your Avid software and software updates, distribution and more.

DISCOVER AVID PLAY
- Manage products with ease
  Manage all of your software, add-ons, and included products right in Avid Link
- Download your gear
  Get all your Sonic Drops and Inner Circle Rewards in one place or explore the marketplace to find new tools.
- Distribute music with AvidPlay
  Distribute your music on Spotify, Apple Music, TikTok, Amazon Prime Music, Anghami, and dozens of other major streaming services around the world. Plus, keep 100% of your rights and earnings. Share your latest release with social links.
